chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH,CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D- 3056 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 03.11.2022 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh along with DSP Headquarter Tando Allahyar Shahabdin, Inspector Noor Muhammad on behalf of DIGP Hyderabad and Inspector Najamuddin on behalf of SSP Hyderabad. ----- Learned AAG has filed comments along with appointment order of the petitioner, which are taken on record, and submits that this petition has served its purpose. Accordingly, this petition in view of above is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
